senders:
aidan merged pull request #214 into main.

fix: debounce token refresh on 401

The refresh now waits 300ms and coalesces concurrent 401s into a single retry, so a burst of expired-token requests no longer fans out into a dozen refreshes. 3 files changed, +48 -12.

View the pull request on GitHub.

Your deployment is live.

Project: acme-web
Environment: Production
Duration: 34s
Commit: fix: debounce token refresh on 401

Visit your deployment at acme-web.vercel.app.

Invoice #A1B2-0042

Amount due: $20.00
Due: July 1, 2026

This covers your monthly plan for June. No action is needed, the card on file will be charged automatically. Your receipt will follow once the payment clears.

Dependabot opened a pull request to bump vite from 6.0.1 to 6.0.4.

This is a patch release with bug fixes only. All 9 status checks passed, including the build and the full test suite.

Merge it when you're ready, or let auto-merge handle it.

acme-ui@2.4.1 is now published to the npm registry.

Published by: aidan
Tarball size: 142 kB

Install it with npm i acme-ui@2.4.1. If you didn't publish this, rotate your access token right away.
